lede: A look at December 11 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Hector Berlioz and Naguib Mahfouz, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Bernie Madoff
events.desc: Bernie Madoff is arrested and charged with securities fraud in a $50 billion Ponzi scheme.

events.title: Albania
events.desc: Demonstrations by students and workers across Albania begin, which eventually trigger the fall of communism in Albania.

events.title: Apollo 17
events.desc: Apollo 17 becomes the sixth and final Apollo mission to land on the Moon.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: Germany and Italy declare war on the United States, following the Americans' declaration of war on the Empire of Japan in the wake of the attack on Pearl Harbor. The United States, in turn, declares war on them.

events.title: Irish War of Independence
events.desc: Irish War of Independence: In retaliation for a recent IRA ambush, British forces burn and loot numerous buildings in Cork city. Many civilians report being beaten, shot at, robbed and verbally abused by British forces.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: British General Edmund Allenby enters Jerusalem on foot and declares martial law.

events.title: Second Boer War
events.desc: Second Boer War: In the Battle of Magersfontein the Boers commanded by general Piet Cronjé inflict a defeat on the forces of the British Empire commanded by Lord Methuen trying to relieve the Siege of Kimberley.

events.title: Root and Branch petition
events.desc: The Root and Branch petition, signed by 15,000 Londoners calling for the abolition of the episcopacy, is presented to the Long Parliament.

events.title: Abbasid Caliphate
events.desc: Assassination of the Abbasid caliph al-Mutawakkil by the Turkish guard, who raise al-Muntasir to the throne, start of the "Anarchy at Samarra".

births.name: Naguib Mahfouz
births.line: Egyptian author, playwright, and screenwriter, Nobel Prize laureate

births.name: John Kerry
births.line: American lieutenant, lawyer, and politician, 68th United States Secretary of State

births.name: Aleksandr Solzhenitsyn
births.line: Russian novelist, historian, and short story writer, Nobel Prize laureate

births.name: Robert Koch
births.line: German microbiologist and physician, Nobel Prize laureate

births.name: Manoel de Oliveira
births.line: Portuguese actor, director, producer, and screenwriter

deaths.text: Vincent du Vigneaud, American biochemist and academic, Nobel Prize laureate
Ivan Cankar, Slovenian author, poet, and playwright
Ludwig Mond, German-born chemist and British industrialist who discovered the metal carbonyls

observances.text: Christian feast day: María de las Maravillas de Jesús
Christian feast day: Victoricus, Fuscian, and Gentian
